steps.title: Check current visual-studio-code-kubernetes-tools deployment
steps.description:
Verify your visual-studio-code-kubernetes-tools version and configuration:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n visual-studio-code-kubernetes-tools -l app.kubernetes.io/name=visual-studio-code-kubernetes-tools
helm list -n visual-studio-code-kubernetes-tools 2>/dev/null || echo "Not installed via Helm"
```
This feature requires a working visual-studio-code-kubernetes-tools installation.

steps.title: Review visual-studio-code-kubernetes-tools configuration
steps.description:
Inspect the relevant visual-studio-code-kubernetes-tools configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n visual-studio-code-kubernetes-tools -l app.kubernetes.io/name=visual-studio-code-kubernetes-tools
kubectl get configmap -n visual-studio-code-kubernetes-tools -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=visual-studio-code-kubernetes-tools
```
Hi,

Is it possible to add a snippet for the ReplicaSet ?

Thanks
Nicolas

steps.title: Apply the fix for ReplicaSet snippet
steps.description:
Just starting to get into kubernetes myself. Here is a sample that might help. 

```
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: ReplicaSet
metadata:
  name: frontend
  labels:
    app: guestbook
    tier: frontend
spec:
  # modify replicas according to your case
  replicas: 3
  selector:
    matchLabels:
     
```yaml
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: ReplicaSet
metadata:
  name: frontend
  labels:
    app: guestbook
    tier: frontend
spec:
  # modify replicas according to your case
  replicas: 3
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      tier: frontend
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        tier: frontend
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: php-redis
        image: gcr.io/google_samples/gb-frontend:v3
```

steps.title: Verify the feature works
steps.description:
Test that the new capability is working as expected:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n visual-studio-code-kubernetes-tools -l app.kubernetes.io/name=visual-studio-code-kubernetes-tools
kubectl get events -n visual-studio-code-kubernetes-tools --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm the feature described in "ReplicaSet snippet" is functioning correctly.

resolution.summary: Just starting to get into kubernetes myself. Here is a sample that might help.
codeSnippets:
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: ReplicaSet
metadata:
  name: frontend
  labels:
    app: guestbook
    tier: frontend
spec:
  # modify replicas according to your case
  replicas: 3
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      tier: frontend
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        tier: frontend
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: php-redis
        image: gcr.io/google_samples/gb-frontend:v3

prerequisites.description: A running Kubernetes cluster with visual-studio-code-kubernetes-tools installed or the issue environment reproducible.
